name: agentdesk
description: AgentDesk makes any machine ready for human and AI-agent work.

interface.longDescription: Setup skills for WSL2, macOS, browsers, monitors, Codex, Claude Code, OpenClaw, and other agent-ready workstation tools.
defaultPrompt: Set up this machine for human and AI-agent work.
Configure browser, monitor, macOS, WSL2, or credential-profile setup.
Repair this workstation setup using the relevant AgentDesk skill.
